chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln. No. S – 67 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For hearing of bail application 20.02.2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General <><><><>..<><><><> Learned counsel for the applicant / accused after arguing the matter at some length, does not press instant Criminal Bail Application; however states that the trial Court may be directed to conclude the trial expeditiously. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General states that speedy trial is right of the applicant / accused. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the trial Court is directed to conclude the trial expeditiously and preferably within a period of one month hereof. Judge ARBROHI
